title: Galt Ultimate Jewellery Craft Kit - Create Your Own Jewellery, Childrens Bracelet & Necklace Making Kit, Kids Arts & Crafts Kit with 500+ Gems, Beads & Charms - Make Your Own Jewelry Box - Ages 7+
features: 500+ GEMS, CHARMS & MORE - Create adorable charm jewellery using the Ultimate Jewellery Craft Kit, featuring a wide selection of over 500 colourful gems, beads and charms, for kids aged 5 and up!

GET CREATIVE: Spark creativity and design your very own friendship bracelets. Pick from a variety of cute animal charms. From your favourite animals including a panda, penguin, dog, cat and fox charm!

JEWELLERY BOX INCLUDED: This arts and crafts kit includes a sparkly jewellery box with mirror for you to decorate, providing a fun activity and a space for your kids to store their handmade treasures.
CREATE UNIQUE DESIGNS: This arts and crafts kit is the perfect gift, encouraging children to explore their artistic side and develop fine motor skills while having fun making unique jewellery pieces.

SHARE WITH FRIENDS: The Ultimate Jewellery Craft Kit provides endless possibilities for creativity and self-expression, making it a fun activity for children to enjoy alone or with friends and family!
description: Product Description Unleash your child’s creativity with the Galt Ultimate Jewellery Craft Kit! This vibrant and engaging arts and crafts kit is perfect for kids aged 5 and up, offering a fun way to design and create their own jewellery. With over 500 colourful gems, beads, and animal charms, including adorable pandas, penguins, dogs, cats, and foxes, kids can craft beautiful friendship bracelets, necklaces, and more. It’s the perfect way to make unique accessories that reflect their style and personality. The kit comes with a sparkly jewellery box featuring a mirror, ready for customization, making it both a creative project and a stylish place to store all their handmade treasures. Whether they’re new to jewellery making or already budding designers, this kit encourages self-expression and artistic exploration, all while helping to develop fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination in young children. The easy-to-use materials and simple instructions mean that kids can dive right in, enjoying hours of hands-on fun. It’s a great way for them to express themselves, share their creations with friends, or even make special gifts for loved ones. The Galt Ultimate Jewellery Craft Kit is perfect for children to enjoy crafting on their own or as a group activity with friends and family, providing endless possibilities for creativity. A thoughtful and inspiring gift that will keep kids engaged, this jewellery making kit turns every crafting session into a magical experience! Safety Warning WARNINGS! Not suitable for children under 36 months due to small parts (choking hazard)
